name: Post-procedure recovery
dek: Centella, panthenol, mineral SPF, and a willingness to do nothing else. The single most important window in any procedural treatment, and the one most-often sabotaged by enthusiastic re-introduction of actives at day 5.
oneliner: Centella, panthenol, occlusion. Skip everything else.
bottom: The patients who re-introduce their full routine at day 5 are the patients who pay for procedures twice. Discipline in this window protects the investment.

triggers.n: Expected. Should be steadily improving day-by-day. Worsening warrants a clinician call.
Normal in the first week post-laser. Do not pick. Petrolatum keeps the surface moist and prevents post-inflammatory pigmentation.
Barrier is healing. Apply ceramide cream every 4–6 hours during the first 72 hours.
Re-epithelialisation. Annoying but normal. Resist scratching, which produces hypertrophic scars.

ingredients.name: Centella triterpene complex (TECA)
ingredients.evidence: Standardised triterpene fractions; the most-evidenced botanical for procedural recovery.

ingredients.name: Panthenol 5%
ingredients.evidence: Reduces TEWL within 48 hours; supports surface repair.

ingredients.name: Petrolatum / Aquaphor
ingredients.evidence: First 72 hours post-laser. Prevents crust formation and accelerates healing.

ingredients.name: Hyaluronic acid + glycerin
ingredients.evidence: Layered under occlusive. Pulls water; the occlusive prevents evaporation.

ingredients.name: Mineral SPF 50+ from day 4
ingredients.evidence: Mandatory. Post-procedure skin is exquisitely UV-sensitive; PIH is the most common avoidable complication.

ingredients.name: EGF (epidermal growth factor)
ingredients.evidence: Promising for laser recovery; small trials. Premium adjunct, not requirement.

phases.b: Petrolatum every 4 hours. Avoid sun completely. No actives, no acids, no retinoids.
Switch to centella + panthenol cream. Add mineral SPF 50+ once any crust resolves. Indoor-only if possible.
Resume gentle cleanser and moisturiser. No retinoid until day 14. No exfoliant until week 3.
Reintroduce retinoid at half-cadence for 2 weeks before resuming nightly. Continue SPF religiously.
